subcodes.first_line: O My friends, open your tongues in gratitude to the Beloved of the Unseen, for He hath adorned the world with a radiance akin to the shining moon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران من لسان بشکرانه محبوب لامکان بگشااید که جهان را برخی چون مه تابان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation
